com.mentor.chs.api

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXLibraryBaseAssembly, IXLibraryChildObject, IXLibraryObject, IXLibraryWireFitsCavityProvider, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

extends IXLibraryBaseAssembly, IXLibraryChildObject
    Interface representing library inhouse assembly.
